title.en: The PAC Radio Rulebook: PHY Requirements and PHY Services (Clauses 9 & 10)
title.zh: PAC 无线电规则手册：PHY 要求与 PHY 服务（第 9、10 章）

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.15.8-2017 — Peer Aware Communications (PAC) — is a standard for letting nearby devices discover and talk to each other directly, with no access point in the middle. So far you have met the MAC (Medium Access Control, the layer that decides who talks when). Clauses 9 and 10 are about the PHY (physical layer, the part that actually turns bits into radio waves and back). Clause 9 is the radio rulebook: how clean, how strong, and how well-behaved a PAC transmitter and receiver must be. Clause 10 is the contract sheet: the abstract service primitives the PHY offers upward to the MAC. Think of Clause 9 as 'how the radio must perform' and Clause 10 as 'how the MAC asks the radio to do things.'
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.8-2017——对等感知通信（Peer Aware Communications, PAC）——是一项让邻近设备无需中间接入点即可直接发现并互相通信的标准。前面你已经认识了 MAC（介质访问控制层，决定谁在何时发送的那一层）。第 9、10 章讲的是 PHY（物理层，真正把比特变成无线电波、再变回比特的部分）。第 9 章是无线电规则手册：PAC 的发射机和接收机必须多干净、多强、多守规矩。第 10 章是服务契约表：PHY 向上提供给 MAC 的抽象服务原语。可以把第 9 章理解为“无线电必须如何表现”，把第 10 章理解为“MAC 如何请求无线电去做事”。

blocks.en: Clause 9.1 (Overview) sets the stage: the PHY turns the radio on and off, sends and receives synchronization preambles (a known bit pattern at the start of a packet that lets the receiver lock onto timing), carries discovery/peering/scheduling/data to the MAC, reports CCA (Clear Channel Assessment — 'is the air busy?') and CQI (Channel Quality Indicator — 'how good is the link?'), and supports MIMO (Multiple-Input Multiple-Output, using several antennas at once) and beamforming. Three PHYs are defined: the OFDM PHY and OFDMA PHY (both multicarrier schemes splitting data across many subcarriers, using BPSK/QPSK/16QAM/64QAM symbol modulations) and the UWB PHY (Ultra-WideBand, very short pulses spread over a huge bandwidth, useful for precision ranging).
blocks.zh: 第 9.1 节（概述）搭好了舞台：PHY 负责开关无线电收发机，发送和接收同步前导码（数据包开头的一段已知比特模式，让接收机锁定时序），向 MAC 传递发现/配对/调度/数据，上报 CCA（空闲信道评估——“空中忙不忙？”）和 CQI（信道质量指示——“链路有多好？”），并支持 MIMO（多输入多输出，同时使用多根天线）和波束赋形。标准定义了三种 PHY：OFDM PHY 与 OFDMA PHY（都是把数据分散到多个子载波上的多载波方案，使用 BPSK/QPSK/16QAM/64QAM 符号调制），以及 UWB PHY（超宽带，用散布在极宽带宽上的极短脉冲，适合精密测距）。

blocks.en: Clause 9.2 (Operating frequency range) pins down where on the dial PAC lives. 9.2.1 (General) lists the bands in a table: roughly 2400–2483.5 MHz and 5725–5875 MHz for OFDM and OFDMA, a sub-1 GHz band around 915.9–929.7 MHz, and 3100–10600 MHz for UWB. 9.2.2 (Channel assignments) then slices each band into numbered channels addressed by a 'channel page' plus a 'channel number.' For example, the 2.4 GHz OFDM band is divided into four 20 MHz channels, while the OFDMA version uses eight 10 MHz channels; the 5.7 GHz band similarly has 20 MHz (OFDM) or 10 MHz (OFDMA) slices. UWB channels are encoded as a compact 12-bit value: 4 bits pick a band index and 8 bits are a bitmask of which mandatory frequencies are occupied.
blocks.zh: 第 9.2 节（工作频率范围）确定了 PAC 在频谱上的位置。9.2.1（总则）用一张表列出各频段：OFDM 和 OFDMA 大致在 2400–2483.5 MHz 与 5725–5875 MHz，亚 1 GHz 频段约在 915.9–929.7 MHz，UWB 在 3100–10600 MHz。9.2.2（信道分配）再把每个频段切成带编号的信道，通过“信道页”加“信道号”来寻址。例如，2.4 GHz 的 OFDM 频段被分为四个 20 MHz 信道，而 OFDMA 版本用八个 10 MHz 信道；5.7 GHz 频段同样有 20 MHz（OFDM）或 10 MHz（OFDMA）的切片。UWB 信道用一个紧凑的 12 位值编码：高 4 位选择频段索引，低 8 位是一个位掩码，指明占用了哪些强制频率。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 440 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="10" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">PAC operating bands (Clause 9.2)</text><rect x="20" y="40" width="60" height="30"/><text x="50" y="59" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Sub-GHz</text><text x="50" y="85" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">~916 MHz</text><rect x="100" y="40" width="70" height="30"/><text x="135" y="59" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">2.4 GHz</text><text x="135" y="85" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">OFDM/OFDMA</text><rect x="190" y="40" width="70" height="30"/><text x="225" y="59" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">5.7 GHz</text><text x="225" y="85" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">OFDM/OFDMA</text><rect x="280" y="40" width="140" height="30"/><text x="350" y="59" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">UWB 3.1-10.6 GHz</text><text x="350" y="85" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">BPM-BPSK / OOK</text><text x="20" y="120" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Each band -> channel page + channel number (9.2.2)</text></svg>

caption.en: The four frequency homes of PAC and the modulation each uses, per Clause 9.2.
caption.zh: PAC 的四个频段栖息地及各自使用的调制方式，依据第 9.2 节。

blocks.en: Clauses 9.3–9.10 are the transmitter quality rules — the checklist a PAC radio must pass on a test bench. 9.3 (ON/OFF time mask) defines a 20 µs transient window when the transmitter ramps between off and on power, so a radio cannot splatter energy while switching. 9.4 (Transmit center frequency tolerance) and 9.5 (Symbol clock frequency tolerance) both demand ±20 ppm accuracy (parts per million — a tiny fractional error) for 10/20 MHz channels, and crucially both must come from the same reference oscillator so frequency and timing drift together. 9.6 (Error Vector Magnitude, EVM) measures how far each received symbol lands from its ideal constellation point; the cleaner the modulation, the tighter the cap (18% for BPSK/QPSK down to 9% for 64QAM). 9.7 (Output RF spectrum emissions): 9.7.1 (General) splits emissions into in-band bandwidth and out-of-band; 9.7.2 (Out-of-band emissions) says spillover must meet whichever is stricter — local regulations or the spectral mask. 9.8 (RF power measurement) says measure at the antenna connector, and for connector-less devices treat it as EIRP (Effective Isotropic Radiated Power). 9.9 (Transmit spectral mask) draws the actual envelope: below −40 dBr at the channel edge and below −50 dBr a little beyond it. 9.10 (Transmit power) says use the lowest power that works, capped by local regulations.
blocks.zh: 第 9.3–9.10 节是发射机质量规则——PAC 无线电在测试台上必须通过的检查清单。9.3（ON/OFF 时间模板）定义了发射机在关与开功率之间爬升时 20 µs 的瞬态窗口，使无线电在切换时不会乱泼能量。9.4（发射中心频率容差）和 9.5（符号时钟频率容差）对 10/20 MHz 信道都要求 ±20 ppm 的精度（百万分之一——极小的相对误差），且两者关键地必须来自同一个参考振荡器，使频率与时序同步漂移。9.6（误差矢量幅度，EVM）衡量每个接收符号落在其理想星座点之外多远；调制越干净，上限越严（BPSK/QPSK 为 18%，到 64QAM 收紧到 9%）。9.7（输出射频频谱发射）：9.7.1（总则）把发射分为带内带宽与带外；9.7.2（带外发射）规定溢出须满足更严者——本地法规或频谱模板。9.8（射频功率测量）规定在天线连接器处测量，对无连接器设备按 EIRP（有效全向辐射功率）处理。9.9（发射频谱模板）画出实际包络：信道边缘低于 −40 dBr，稍远处低于 −50 dBr。9.10（发射功率）规定使用能工作的最低功率，并受本地法规上限约束。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 400 180" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="10" y="16" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">Transmit spectral mask (Clause 9.9)</text><line x1="40" y1="150" x2="390" y2="150"/><line x1="40" y1="40" x2="40" y2="150"/><text x="8" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8">0 dBr</text><text x="6" y="100" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8">-40 dBr</text><text x="6" y="130" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8">-50 dBr</text><polyline points="40,95 160,95 160,45 280,45 280,95 360,95 360,125 390,125"/><line x1="160" y1="45" x2="160" y2="150" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="280" y1="45" x2="280" y2="150" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><text x="205" y="165" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">fc (channel center)</text><text x="150" y="165" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="end">edge</text><text x="345" y="165" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8">edge+d</text></svg>

caption.en: The spectral mask in Clause 9.9: energy must drop below −40 dBr at the channel edge and below −50 dBr a guard distance d beyond it.
caption.zh: 第 9.9 节的频谱模板：能量必须在信道边缘降到 −40 dBr 以下，并在边缘外保护距离 d 处降到 −50 dBr 以下。

blocks.en: Clauses 9.11–9.15 cover the receiver side and the measurements it reports back up. 9.11 (Receiver sensitivity) lists the minimum power a receiver must still decode with PER ≤ 10% (Packet Error Rate) over a 1000-octet payload — from about −97 dBm for the most robust BPSK rate down to −74 dBm for fast 64QAM. 9.12 (Start and end of a PPDU) precisely defines the on-air boundaries of a packet: the PPDU (PHY Protocol Data Unit, the complete over-the-air frame) starts at the first sample carrying the preamble and ends at the last sample of the last symbol. 9.13 (CCA — Clear Channel Assessment) is how the PHY tells the MAC the medium is busy: 9.13.1 (General) ties it to the PLDE-CCA.indication primitive; 9.13.2 (CCA requirements) lays out five modes — energy detect, carrier sense, both combined, ALOHA (always-idle) for UWB, and UWB preamble sense — with concrete detect-busy thresholds and timings; 9.13.3 (Receiver Energy Detection, ED) defines a raw power estimate for channel selection, its threshold, and its averaging time. Finally 9.14 (Channel Quality Indicator, CQI) characterizes received-packet quality using pilot signals to help pick modulation/MIMO, and 9.15 (Received Channel Power Indicator, RCPI) is a calibrated 0–220 byte reading of received RF power, accurate to ±5 dB.
blocks.zh: 第 9.11–9.15 节涵盖接收端及其向上回报的测量。9.11（接收灵敏度）列出接收机仍须以 PER ≤ 10%（包错误率）正确解出 1000 字节净荷所需的最小功率——从最稳健 BPSK 速率约 −97 dBm，到高速 64QAM 的 −74 dBm。9.12（PPDU 的起止）精确定义包的空中边界：PPDU（PHY 协议数据单元，完整的空口帧）从承载前导码的第一个采样开始，到最后一个符号的最后一个采样结束。9.13（CCA——空闲信道评估）是 PHY 告诉 MAC 介质忙的方式：9.13.1（总则）将其与 PLDE-CCA.indication 原语绑定；9.13.2（CCA 要求）列出五种模式——能量检测、载波侦听、两者结合、UWB 用的 ALOHA（始终空闲）以及 UWB 前导码侦听——并给出具体的判忙门限与时延；9.13.3（接收能量检测，ED）定义用于信道选择的原始功率估计、其门限与平均时间。最后，9.14（信道质量指示，CQI）用导频信号刻画接收包的质量以辅助选择调制/MIMO，9.15（接收信道功率指示，RCPI）是经校准的 0–220 字节接收射频功率读数，精度为 ±5 dB。

blocks.en: A quick mental model for the three receiver readings: ED (9.13.3) is 'how much raw energy is here, signal or not' (used to pick a clean channel); RCPI (9.15) is 'how strong was this frame I just received' (a calibrated dBm-like scale); CQI (9.14) is 'how good was the link quality' (used to choose a faster or slower modulation). Energy, strength, quality — three different questions.
blocks.zh: 记住三种接收读数的快速心智模型：ED（9.13.3）是“这里有多少原始能量，无论是不是信号”（用于挑选干净信道）；RCPI（9.15）是“我刚收到的这一帧有多强”（一个经校准的类 dBm 标度）；CQI（9.14）是“链路质量有多好”（用于选择更快或更慢的调制）。能量、强度、质量——三个不同的问题。

blocks.en: Clause 10 (PHY services) switches from physics to interfaces. 10.1 (Overview) frames the PHY as three jobs — formatting bits, mapping them onto radio signals, and reporting channel feedback — sitting below higher layers via service access points. 10.2 (PHY description) lists everything the detailed PHY clauses will specify: physical channels, PPDU format and resource elements, symbol mapping, reference and synchronization signals, multicarrier generation, scrambling, MIMO layer mapping/precoding, beamforming, channel coding, and interleaving. 10.3 (PHY procedures) names the runtime behaviors: synchronization (including network sync), power control, and CSI (Channel State Information) feedback reporting. 10.4 (PHY measurements) defines what the PHY measures, how it reports results upward, and idle-mode measurements. 10.5 (PHY services) introduces the two doorways: the PLDE-SAP for data and the PLME-SAP for management (SAP = Service Access Point, the abstract boundary where one layer offers services to the next).
blocks.zh: 第 10 章（PHY 服务）从物理学切换到接口。10.1（概述）把 PHY 概括为三项工作——格式化比特、把比特映射到无线电信号、回报信道反馈——通过服务接入点位于高层之下。10.2（PHY 描述）列出后续详细 PHY 章节将规定的一切：物理信道、PPDU 格式与资源单元、符号映射、参考信号与同步信号、多载波生成、扰码、MIMO 层映射/预编码、波束赋形、信道编码与交织。10.3（PHY 流程）点名运行期行为：同步（含网络同步）、功率控制，以及 CSI（信道状态信息）反馈上报。10.4（PHY 测量）定义 PHY 测什么、如何向上回报结果，以及空闲模式测量。10.5（PHY 服务）引出两道门：用于数据的 PLDE-SAP 和用于管理的 PLME-SAP（SAP = 服务接入点，一层向上一层提供服务的抽象边界）。

blocks.en:
flowchart TB
  HL[Higher layers / MAC ME] -->|PLME-SAP mgmt| PLME[PLME: PHY mgmt entity]
  MAC[MAC data plane] -->|PLDE-SAP data| PLDE[PLDE: PHY data entity]
  PLME --> PHY[PHY radio]
  PLDE --> PHY
  PHY --> TX[Tx / Rx air interface]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TB
  HL[高层 / MAC 管理实体] -->|PLME-SAP 管理| PLME[PLME: PHY 管理实体]
  MAC[MAC 数据面] -->|PLDE-SAP 数据| PLDE[PLDE: PHY 数据实体]
  PLME --> PHY[PHY 无线电]
  PLDE --> PHY
  PHY --> TX[发送 / 接收 空口]

blocks.en: The two SAPs are where the MAC actually drives the radio. 10.6 (PLME-SAP interface): 10.6.1 (Introduction) says it handles management commands to the local PHY; 10.6.2 (PHY characteristics) defines the one primitive pair PLME-CHARACTERISTICS.request/.confirm, by which the management entity asks the PHY to report its operational timing — SlotTime, MIFS, ImmAckTime, CCATime, turnaround and ramp times, propagation time, and PSDUMaxLength (the biggest payload the PPDU can carry). 10.7 (PLDE-SAP interface): 10.7.1 (Introduction) describes the data-plane doorway, and 10.7.2 (Data) defines the working primitives — PLDE-DATA moves one octet at a time between MAC and PHY, while PLDE-TXSTART/TXEND, PLDE-CCARESET, PLDE-CCA.indication, and PLDE-RXSTART/RXEND choreograph when transmission and reception begin and end. Together, Clause 9 guarantees the radio behaves, and Clause 10 gives the MAC a clean, abstract set of buttons to press.
blocks.zh: 两个 SAP 正是 MAC 真正驱动无线电之处。10.6（PLME-SAP 接口）：10.6.1（引言）说明它处理对本地 PHY 的管理命令；10.6.2（PHY 特性）定义唯一一对原语 PLME-CHARACTERISTICS.request/.confirm，管理实体借此请求 PHY 回报其运行时序——SlotTime、MIFS、ImmAckTime、CCATime、收发转换与爬升时间、传播时间，以及 PSDUMaxLength（PPDU 可承载的最大净荷）。10.7（PLDE-SAP 接口）：10.7.1（引言）描述数据面的门，10.7.2（数据）定义实际工作原语——PLDE-DATA 每次在 MAC 与 PHY 之间搬运一个字节，而 PLDE-TXSTART/TXEND、PLDE-CCARESET、PLDE-CCA.indication 以及 PLDE-RXSTART/RXEND 编排发送与接收的起止时机。合起来，第 9 章保证无线电守规矩，第 10 章给 MAC 一套干净、抽象、可按下的按钮。

summary.en: Coverage map — every clause number in this lesson
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——本课涉及的每一个章节号

blocks.en: Clause 9 (General PHY requirements): 9.1 Overview (three PHYs: OFDM/OFDMA/UWB, PHY functions). 9.2 Operating frequency range — 9.2.1 General (band/modulation table), 9.2.2 Channel assignments (channel pages + numbers; sub-GHz, 2.4/5.7 GHz, UWB channelization). 9.3 ON/OFF time mask (20 µs transient). 9.4 Transmit center frequency tolerance (±20 ppm). 9.5 Symbol clock frequency tolerance (±20 ppm, shared oscillator). 9.6 EVM (modulation-accuracy caps 18%–9%). 9.7 Output RF spectrum emissions — 9.7.1 General (in-band + OOB), 9.7.2 Out-of-band emissions (stricter of regs/mask). 9.8 RF power measurement (at connector / EIRP). 9.9 Transmit spectral mask (−40/−50 dBr). 9.10 Transmit power (lowest possible). 9.11 Receiver sensitivity (PER ≤ 10% table). 9.12 Start and end of a PPDU. 9.13 CCA — 9.13.1 General (PLDE-CCA.indication), 9.13.2 CCA requirements (Modes 1–5), 9.13.3 Receiver ED. 9.14 CQI. 9.15 RCPI (0–220, ±5 dB). Clause 10 (PHY services): 10.1 Overview. 10.2 PHY description. 10.3 PHY procedures. 10.4 PHY measurements. 10.5 PHY services (PLDE/PLME SAPs). 10.6 PLME-SAP — 10.6.1 Introduction, 10.6.2 PHY characteristics (PLME-CHARACTERISTICS). 10.7 PLDE-SAP — 10.7.1 Introduction, 10.7.2 Data (PLDE-DATA and the TX/RX/CCA primitives).
blocks.zh: 第 9 章（PHY 通用要求）：9.1 概述（三种 PHY：OFDM/OFDMA/UWB 及 PHY 功能）。9.2 工作频率范围——9.2.1 总则（频段/调制表），9.2.2 信道分配（信道页+信道号；亚 GHz、2.4/5.7 GHz、UWB 信道化）。9.3 ON/OFF 时间模板（20 µs 瞬态）。9.4 发射中心频率容差（±20 ppm）。9.5 符号时钟频率容差（±20 ppm，共用振荡器）。9.6 EVM（调制精度上限 18%–9%）。9.7 输出射频频谱发射——9.7.1 总则（带内+带外），9.7.2 带外发射（取法规/模板更严者）。9.8 射频功率测量（连接器处/EIRP）。9.9 发射频谱模板（−40/−50 dBr）。9.10 发射功率（尽可能最低）。9.11 接收灵敏度（PER ≤ 10% 表）。9.12 PPDU 的起止。9.13 CCA——9.13.1 总则（PLDE-CCA.indication），9.13.2 CCA 要求（模式 1–5），9.13.3 接收能量检测。9.14 CQI。9.15 RCPI（0–220，±5 dB）。第 10 章（PHY 服务）：10.1 概述。10.2 PHY 描述。10.3 PHY 流程。10.4 PHY 测量。10.5 PHY 服务（PLDE/PLME SAP）。10.6 PLME-SAP——10.6.1 引言，10.6.2 PHY 特性（PLME-CHARACTERISTICS）。10.7 PLDE-SAP——10.7.1 引言，10.7.2 数据（PLDE-DATA 及 TX/RX/CCA 原语）。

cites.note: Clause 9 General PHY requirements: overview, frequency range and channelization, ON/OFF mask, frequency/clock tolerance, EVM, RF spectrum emissions, power measurement, spectral mask, transmit power, receiver sensitivity, PPDU boundaries, CCA, ED, CQI, RCPI.
Clause 10 PHY services: overview, PHY description, procedures, measurements, services, PLME-SAP (PHY characteristics), PLDE-SAP (data and TX/RX/CCA primitives).
